title: Tenses Through Festivals — Level 1
tagline: A playful first step into past, present and future tenses.
description: Children learn how actions change across time through familiar Indian festival scenes. They observe the picture, build or complete a sentence and flip the card to check the tense and language guidance.
benefits: Introduces past, present and future tenses in context
Builds sentence formation, vocabulary and speaking confidence
Connects early grammar learning with familiar Indian festivals

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Past, present and future tenses, Indian festivals, action words, sentence formation, vocabulary and cultural awareness.
